It may either be a reference to this Karpman, or a pure coincidence. ===Name origin=== * Karpman is derived from [[Magikarp]] and is a nod to Eric Cartman of ''[[wikipedia:South Park|South Park]]''.[https://web.archive.org/web/20151028192146/http://www.rijon.com/rijonadventures/ rijonAdventures official site (archived)] * Lachlan is a name derived from Irish ''Lochlainn'', which means "Viking, Scandinavian", from ''Lochlann'' (Old Irish for "Scandinavia", literally means "land of the lakes", as ''loch'' means "lake".) It also sounds similar to ''lachtan'', Czech for "seal". * Corall may be derived from ''coral''. ==References== [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Citizens of Rijon]] [[Category:Gym leaders]] [[Category:Male characters]]
